faculty_instructor.routes
=========================

.. py:module:: faculty_instructor.routes

.. autoapi-nested-parse::

   Faculty instructor routes: course list, class roster, grade entry, and grade submission.

   All routes require an authenticated session with role 'faculty_instructor' or
   'system_admin'. Routes are registered on the 'faculty_instructor' blueprint.



Functions
---------

.. autoapisummary::

   faculty_instructor.routes.index
   faculty_instructor.routes.courses
   faculty_instructor.routes.roster
   faculty_instructor.routes.grades
   faculty_instructor.routes.submit_grade

---------------
